expected_behavior: A short comedy monologue episode (~15 min) with low atom density. Falls into the default-stub lower band: atoms/50 = 1 → exactly 1 inferred chapter. Pins the gate's behaviour on monologue-style content where the chapter prior contributes minimal new structure but must not over-segment.
synthesis_notes: Models a short stand-up / monologue digest. Synthetic shape, no transcript text or commercial-message attribution.
